title: Learning Addition with One and One

segments.narration: What happens when we have one apple and add one more apple?
Let's count together: one apple plus one more apple makes two apples!
Now, use your fingers to show one plus one, how many do you have?
Great job! One plus one equals two, keep practicing this addition!

teacherNotes: Encourage students to use physical objects for hands-on practice with addition.
